ssa_niit_mismatch.description: 3 remaining failures: cases 67, 91, 95 — all involve SSA + 1099-B combinations. Likely SSA taxability calculation or NIIT/Additional Medicare Tax mismatch vs gen_correct.ts reference

savers_credit_overcredit.description: Saver's Credit (Form 8880) over-reduces tax. Case 99: tax should be $425 (engine gives $0, overcredits by $425). Case 103: tax should be $3943 (engine gives $3143, overcredits by $800). Case 98 (50% rate) passes. Bug is in credit calculation or nonrefundable cap logic.

w2g_gambling_agi_missing.description: W-2G gambling winnings ($5,000) not flowing to AGI. Engine shows AGI=$38,000 (wages only) instead of $43,000 (wages + gambling). W-2G input node likely not routing box1_winnings to Schedule 1 Line 8b.

foreign_tax_credit_missing.description: De minimis FTC ($75 from 1099-INT box6 + $45 from 1099-DIV box7 = $120) not being applied. Tax is $6,564 vs $6,444 (off by exactly $120). FTC should flow to Schedule 3 Line 1 without Form 1116.

f2441_dep_care_routing.description: Form 2441 dep care credit routing error. Engine shows total_payments=$4,215 vs correct $3,800 (overcounting by $415). Tax correctly 0. Extra $415 likely being added to payments instead of just reducing tax. Also involves CTC + Form 2441 interaction.
